## Checks

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] I kept examples metadata-only and redacted private paths.
- [ ] I did not include game files, extracted scripts, CG, audio, video, cracks, serials, or bypass instructions.
- [ ] If I edited `data/error-recipes.json`, I ran `npm run build:recipes`.
- [ ] If I edited `data/engine-rules.json`, I ran `npm run build:engines`.
